---
title: "Week 6"
date: 03-03-26
description: This week provides an overview of Convolutional Neural Networks.
editor: source
---


## Resources

| Lecture | Slides                   | Videos  | R Code Files |
|---------|--------------------------|---------|----------|
| 1       | [Slides](../lectures/6a) | [Video](https://youtu.be/SMlcHXJXdSQ) | [CIFAR-10](../lectures/R/6a.R)  |
